jobs.title: Carpenter / Furniture Maker
jobs.description: We are looking for a skilled and passionate Carpenter to join our workshop team. In this role, you will be responsible for crafting, repairing, and installing high-quality wooden structures and furniture. The ideal candidate has an eye for detail, deep knowledge of wood types, and a commitment to delivering durable, beautifully finished products.
jobs.requirements:
Proven experience as a carpenter or cabinet maker.

Certificate in Carpentry and Joinery (from a recognized vocational institute like UVQF/BTVET is a plus).

Strong understanding of carpentry techniques and wood properties.

Ability to use both hand and power tools safely.

Good physical condition and stamina.
jobs.responsibilities:
>Read blueprints, sketches, or product designs to grasp requirements.

>Measure, cut, shape, and assemble wood and other materials.

>Build furniture such as beds, cabinets, tables, and doors.

>Inspect, repair, or replace damaged framework or fixtures.

>Maintain and safely operate workshop tools and machinery.

jobs.title: Web Designer
jobs.description: We are seeking a creative Web Designer to build visually stunning and highly functional websites for our clients. You will be responsible for the entire visual design process, from conceptualization to execution, ensuring a seamless and engaging user experience across desktop and mobile devices.
jobs.requirements:
Strong portfolio demonstrating modern, responsive web design skills.

Proficiency in design tools (Figma, Adobe XD, Photoshop).

Good understanding of HTML, CSS, and basic JavaScript.

Experience working with Content Management Systems (CMS), especially WordPress.

Excellent communication skills and attention to detail.
jobs.responsibilities:
Create website layouts, user interfaces, and navigation menus.

Design graphic elements, icons, and banners matching client branding.

Build and customize websites using platforms like WordPress, Webflow, or Shopify.

Collaborate with developers to ensure proper integration of front-end and back-end features.

Test, debug, and optimize websites for speed, responsiveness, and SEO.

jobs.title: Tailor / Fashion Designer
jobs.description: We are seeking a skilled and creative Tailor / Fashion Designer to join our apparel team. You will be responsible for designing, cutting, and stitching high-quality clothing items ranging from traditional wear to modern custom outfits. The ideal candidate has excellent attention to detail, strong sewing machine skills, and a solid understanding of fabric types and garment construction.
jobs.requirements:
Proven experience as a professional tailor or fashion designer.

Certificate or training in Fashion and Design / Garment Construction.

Expertise in operating sewing machines, overlockers, and ironing equipment.

Strong time-management skills to deliver customer orders on schedule.

Ability to work with various materials, including African print (Kitenge), cotton, and silk.
jobs.responsibilities:
Take accurate body measurements of clients and consult on design styles.

Sketch designs, create patterns, and cut fabrics precisely according to specifications.

Operate industrial and manual sewing machines to assemble garments.

Perform alterations, repairs, and final fittings to ensure the perfect garment fit.

Keep up with local and international fashion trends to offer modern design options.

jobs.title: Plumber / Pipefitter
jobs.description: Our construction and maintenance firm is hiring an experienced Plumber to install, inspect, and repair plumbing systems. In this role, you will work on water supply lines, drainage networks, and waste disposal systems in residential, commercial, or industrial projects, ensuring all systems function safely and reliably.
jobs.requirements:
Certificate or Diploma in Plumbing or Civil Engineering (Vocational training preferred).

Hands-on experience working as a residential or commercial plumber.

Deep knowledge of plumbing tools, pipe materials, and fittings (PVC, PPR, GI).

Strong problem-solving abilities and physical fitness.

Reliability and the ability to work independently or as part of a construction crew.
jobs.responsibilities:
Read and interpret blueprints and building plans to map out plumbing layouts.

Install water pipes, drainage systems, sinks, toilets, showers, and water heaters.

Troubleshoot and repair plumbing issues such as leaks, blockages, and low water pressure.

Inspect plumbing systems and test pipes for leaks using pressure gauges.

Ensure all installations comply with standard safety regulations and plumbing codes.

jobs.title: Network Engineer
jobs.description: We are seeking a skilled and proactive Network Engineer to design, implement, maintain, and support our growing network infrastructure. You will be responsible for ensuring high availability, performance, and security of our local and wide area networks (LAN/WAN). The ideal candidate is a strong problem-solver who can maintain dependable network connectivity to keep our business operations running smoothly.
jobs.requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Computer Engineering, or a related field.

Professional networking certifications are highly desirable (e.g., Cisco CCNA/CCNP, CompTIA Network+).

Hands-on experience with network administration, routing protocols (OSPF, BGP), and security frameworks.

Familiarity with network monitoring tools and cloud networking environments.

Strong analytical skills and the ability to respond effectively to network emergencies.
jobs.responsibilities:
Configure, install, and maintain network hardware, including routers, switches, firewalls, and wireless access points.

Monitor network performance, troubleshoot connectivity issues, and optimize network traffic flow.

Implement and maintain robust network security measures (VPNs, access control lists, firewalls) to protect data integrity.

Manage IP addressing schemes, VLAN allocation, and routing protocols.

Create and maintain comprehensive network documentation, diagrams, and backup configurations.
